steps.title: Find the real subject
steps.content: The subject is the singular person Mathematician Grigori Perelman. The phrase about Hamilton and Yau is set off by commas and does not change the number of the subject.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: A, B, and C are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject Perelman. The singular present verb completes the passive construction credited with proving. The answer is D.
